info.title: SDKWork Commerce Backend API
info.description: Backend/admin contract for SDKWork Commerce catalog, order, payment, inventory, wallet, promotion, invoice, membership, and reporting modules.
info.x-sdkwork-audience: Backend consoles, operators, control-plane integrations, and admin automation.
